mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_MEMBER WHERE IS_DONOR = 'Y' AND WITHDRAW_YN = 'N') AS totalDonorCnt, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(PAY_AMT), 0) FROM TB_DONATION_PAYMENT WHERE PAY_STATUS = 'DONE') AS totalDonationAmt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_DEV_REQUEST WHERE STATUS = 'WAITING' AND DEL_YN = 'N') AS waitTicketCnt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_VISIT_LOG WHERE DATE(VISIT_DT) = CURDATE()) AS todayVisitor, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_VISIT_LOG) AS totalVisitor FROM DUAL
SELECT TITLE, VIEW_CNT, BRD_TYPE FROM TB_BOARD WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY VIEW_CNT DESC LIMIT 5

choose.when: SELECT CAST(DATE_FORMAT(VISIT_DT, '%m-%d') AS CHAR) as label, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM TB_VISIT_LOG WHERE VISIT_DT >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) GROUP BY label ORDER BY MIN(VISIT_DT)
SELECT CAST(DATE_FORMAT(VISIT_DT, '%Y-%m') AS CHAR) as label, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM TB_VISIT_LOG WHERE VISIT_DT >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH) GROUP BY label ORDER BY MIN(VISIT_DT)
choose.otherwise: SELECT CONCAT(MONTH(VISIT_DT), '월 ', CEILING((DAY(VISIT_DT) + WEEKDAY(VISIT_DT - INTERVAL (DAY(VISIT_DT) - 1) DAY)) / 7), '째주') as label, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM TB_VISIT_LOG WHERE VISIT_DT >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 8 WEEK) GROUP BY label ORDER BY MIN(VISIT_DT)

mapper.select:
SELECT T.label, SUM(CASE WHEN T.type = 'DONATE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as donateCnt, SUM(CASE WHEN T.type = 'VOL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as volCnt FROM ( SELECT
CAST(DATE_FORMAT(REG_DT, '%m-%d') AS CHAR) CAST(DATE_FORMAT(REG_DT, '%Y-%m') AS CHAR) CONCAT(MONTH(REG_DT), '월 ', CEILING((DAY(REG_DT) + WEEKDAY(REG_DT - INTERVAL (DAY(REG_DT) - 1) DAY)) / 7), '째주') as label, 'DONATE' as type, REG_DT FROM TB_DONATION_PAYMENT WHERE REG_DT >= DATE_SUB(NOW(),
INTERVAL 7 DAY INTERVAL 12 MONTH INTERVAL 8 WEEK )
UNION ALL
SELECT
CAST(DATE_FORMAT(REG_DT, '%m-%d') AS CHAR) CAST(DATE_FORMAT(REG_DT, '%Y-%m') AS CHAR) CONCAT(MONTH(REG_DT), '월 ', CEILING((DAY(REG_DT) + WEEKDAY(REG_DT - INTERVAL (DAY(REG_DT) - 1) DAY)) / 7), '째주') as label, 'VOL' as type, REG_DT FROM TB_VOLUNTEER_APPLY WHERE REG_DT >= DATE_SUB(NOW(),
INTERVAL 7 DAY INTERVAL 12 MONTH INTERVAL 8 WEEK ) ) T GROUP BY T.label ORDER BY MIN(T.REG_DT)
